name: Gourmet Glazed Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Spray a large jelly roll pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Boil water; add nuts. Cook and stir for one minute; drain on paper towels.
4. Rinse the nuts a couple of times with hot water, then drain again on paper towels.
5. Transfer the nuts to the baking pan.
6. Sprinkle the nuts with sugar; stir to mix, but do not dissolve the sugar.
7. Spread the nuts in a single layer.
8. Drizzle the nuts with butter.
9. Bake for 15 minutes; stir well and bake another 10 to 15 minutes or until evenly toasted.
10. Remove the nuts from the oven using a slotted spoon when cool.
11. Sprinkle lightly with salt.
12. Store in a refrigerator in a tightly covered container.
Makes 38 servings (1 oz each).
